evidence: "This is a really well-done mystery, that immerses you in the time-period and story from the start."
"I also like movies that deal with time travel and romance, so that also contributed to me enjoying the movie."
"I found the movie enjoyable and different."
"This is a sweet movie if you're looking for something simple and uplifting."
"I enjoyed the movie. As another reviewer commented, it might not be among the top movies ever made, but I still found it to be a satisfying, family-oriented evening's entertainment."
"An engaging story that provides good entertainment."

"I really enjoyed this movie! It takes you for a good ride, with a culinary theme as the backdrop for life's dramas, and with a pleasing emphasis on the importance of relationships with family and friends."
"...the success of the show is not only due to the brilliant writing and production, but to the richness and integrity of the actors who bring it to life."
"I can't understand the low reviews some people gave this. Maybe it is just a matter of taste."
"What a wonderful, uplifting movie! I'm so glad I gave it a try!"
"...the story pulls you in as it unfolds."

"I enjoyed this movie more than I expected to... And only at the end, when the surface-level story-line had concluded, did I realize that my whole interpretation of that story was potentially incorrect."

summary: The user enjoys well-crafted mysteries and family-oriented films, often appreciating uplifting narratives. They prefer slower-paced stories that emphasize character development and emotional depth, while showing a strong sensitivity to production quality.
